hooks.prompt: Nexus Investment Intelligence plugin is active. Available commands: /nexus-quick-cut (credit memo), /nexus-underwrite (CRE), /nexus-screen (deal scoring), /nexus-model (financial models), /nexus-research (market intel), /nexus-debate (adversarial thesis debate). Type / to see all commands.

Agent analysis complete. Ensure output includes: (1) confidence calibration score, (2) data gaps identified, (3) key risks highlighted. If the analysis was a deal evaluation, suggest running /nexus-debate for adversarial stress-testing.
